title: CBP Frame Configuration
description: Configuration schema for a CBP frame — the viewport that scopes a subset of the graph for serialization and delivery to consumers. Frame ids are human-readable (the only intentional exception to BLAKE3-derived ids) because they appear in URL paths (/v1/frame/{id}).

id.description: Human-readable frame identifier. Appears in REST URL paths. Lowercase alphanumeric with underscores.

domain_tags.description: Domain categorization. Used for CBQ tag filtering and for cross-domain conformance enforcement.

root_weight.description: Default weight inherited by all children that do not override w.

root_decay.description: Default decay policy inherited by all children that do not override decay.

refresh_policy.description: When the frame's nodes are refreshed from upstream data. 'on_demand' = on client request only. 'interval:N' = every N seconds. 'event:name' = on named event trigger.

max_token_budget.description: Hard cap on serialized output tokens for this frame (invariant #1: token budget is law). The serializer prunes, compresses, or drops tier — never overflows.

inheritance_mode.description: 'prototypal' = child inherits all fields from parent, overrides selectively. 'override_only' = child must declare all fields explicitly.

conditional_edge_eval.description: 'eager' = all conditionals evaluated on frame resolve. 'lazy' = conditionals evaluated only when the edge's src or tgt is requested.

tokenizer.description: Tokenizer identifier for budget enforcement. Implementations register tokenizers by string id. Default is o200k_base (OpenAI). A 'length_fallback' tokenizer (chars/4) is available in environments without tiktoken.

acl_tags.description: Bearer-token access control (G8 v0.x). A request's token must match at least one acl tag to access this frame. Empty array = accessible to all authenticated tokens.
